name: Tear Blocks Down
author: Poki
description: Tear Blocks Down is a blocky shooter game where you shoot zombies and occasionally blocks around the map to defend yourself. Choose your favorite map, and enlist help of other strong archers, sword masters and fighters to stand alongside you in this exciting adventure. Are you ready to Tear Blocks Down? How to play Tear Blocks Down? Computer: WASD or the arrow keys to walk around Move your cursor to look around Click to shoot Hold SHIFT for sprinting Mobile: Drag the joystick around to walk Drag the screen to look around Tap the right buttons to shoot, jump, and reload Who created Tear Blocks Down? Tear Blocks Down is created by AM-Games. Play their other games on Poki: Crazy Descent and Sky Race ! How can I play Tear Blocks Down for free? You can play Tear Blocks Down for free on Poki. Can I play Tear Blocks Down on mobile devices and desktop? Tear Blocks Down can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
